_comment: Model picker lists, pulled by the app on launch (models:sync) so new model releases appear without an app update. Keys are engine ids from providers.js. The bundled arrays in providers.js are only the offline/first-run fallback. IMPORTANT: do not add a 'codex-oss' key. That engine lists whatever Ollama reports locally, and a key here would override the user's real local models. Claude ids are tier aliases, so 'claude --model sonnet' always resolves to the latest model of that tier and never goes stale. Only list ids that `claude --model` actually accepts.

claude.label: Opus 4.8
claude.desc: Most capable, best for hard builds

claude.label: Fable 5
claude.desc: Anthropic's flagship, for the hardest problems
